testsuite.name: 线程池隔离测试

testcase.name: 并发执行多个规则应正常工作
应使用独立线程池执行规则

testsuite.system-out: 2026-03-29 17:22:55.541 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-2] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule concurrent-rule-1 executed in 0ms 2026-03-29 17:22:55.541 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-3] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule concurrent-rule-2 executed in 0ms 2026-03-29 17:22:55.541 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule concurrent-rule-0 executed in 1ms 2026-03-29 17:22:55.541 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-7] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule concurrent-rule-4 executed in 0ms 2026-03-29 17:22:55.541 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-4] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule concurrent-rule-3 executed in 0ms 2026-03-29 17:22:55.541 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-5] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule concurrent-rule-6 executed in 0ms 2026-03-29 17:22:55.541 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-6] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule concurrent-rule-5 executed in 0ms 2026-03-29 17:22:55.541 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-2] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule concurrent-rule-8 executed in 0ms 2026-03-29 17:22:55.541 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-8] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule concurrent-rule-7 executed in 0ms 2026-03-29 17:22:55.541 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-3] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule concurrent-rule-9 executed in 0ms 2026-03-29 17:22:55.543 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.service.RuleExecutionService - Rule rule-008 executed in 0ms
